mapper.sql: VISIT_DATE, VISIT_NO, ORDINAL, PATIENT_ID, ILLNESS_DESC, ANAMNESIS, FAMILY_ILL, MARRITAL, INDIVIDUAL, MENSES, MED_HISTORY, BODY_EXAM, DIAG_CODE, DIAG_DESC, ADVICE, DOCTOR, OPERATION_RECORD, MEDICAL_RECORD, PRINT_DATE_TIME
mapper.insert: insert into OUTP_MR (VISIT_DATE, VISIT_NO, ORDINAL, PATIENT_ID, ILLNESS_DESC, ANAMNESIS, FAMILY_ILL, MARRITAL, INDIVIDUAL, MENSES, MED_HISTORY, BODY_EXAM, DIAG_CODE, DIAG_DESC, ADVICE, DOCTOR, OPERATION_RECORD, MEDICAL_RECORD, PRINT_DATE_TIME) values (#{visitDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{visitNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ordinal,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{illnessDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{anamnesis,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{familyIll,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{marrital,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{individual,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menses,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{medHistory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bodyExam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{diagCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{diagDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{advice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationRecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{medicalRecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{printDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into OUTP_MR
VISIT_DATE,
VISIT_NO,
ORDINAL,
PATIENT_ID,
ILLNESS_DESC,
ANAMNESIS,
FAMILY_ILL,
MARRITAL,
INDIVIDUAL,
MENSES,
MED_HISTORY,
BODY_EXAM,
DIAG_CODE,
DIAG_DESC,
ADVICE,
DOCTOR,
OPERATION_RECORD,
MEDICAL_RECORD,
PRINT_DATE_TIME,
#{visitDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{visitNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{ordinal,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{illnessDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{anamnesis,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{familyIll,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{marrital,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{individual,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{menses,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{medHistory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bodyExam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{diagCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{diagDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{advice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operationRecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{medicalRecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{printDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update OUTP_MR
PATIENT_ID = #{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ILLNESS_DESC = #{illnessDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ANAMNESIS = #{anamnesis,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FAMILY_ILL = #{familyIll,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MARRITAL = #{marrital,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
INDIVIDUAL = #{individual,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MENSES = #{menses,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MED_HISTORY = #{medHistory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BODY_EXAM = #{bodyExam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DIAG_CODE = #{diagCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DIAG_DESC = #{diagDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADVICE = #{advice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DOCTOR = #{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OPERATION_RECORD = #{operationRecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEDICAL_RECORD = #{medicalRecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRINT_DATE_TIME = #{printDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where VISIT_DATE = #{visitDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} and VISIT_NO = #{visitNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and ORDINAL = #{ordinal,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

update OUTP_MR set PATIENT_ID = #{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ILLNESS_DESC = #{illnessDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ANAMNESIS = #{anamnesis,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FAMILY_ILL = #{familyIll,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MARRITAL = #{marrital,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INDIVIDUAL = #{individual,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENSES = #{menses,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MED_HISTORY = #{medHistory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BODY_EXAM = #{bodyExam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIAG_CODE = #{diagCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIAG_DESC = #{diagDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADVICE = #{advice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOCTOR = #{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPERATION_RECORD = #{operationRecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEDICAL_RECORD = #{medicalRecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRINT_DATE_TIME = #{printDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where VISIT_DATE = #{visitDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} and VISIT_NO = #{visitNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and ORDINAL = #{ordinal,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
